ValidationRule.description: This Account can be modified only by Account Owner or User with Sales Ops Extended profile
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
NOT(ISNEW()),
OR( Id = '0010O0000272rRK', Id = '0010O0000272rRKQAY' ),
$User.Id <> OwnerId , $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended',
NOT(CONTAINS($User.FirstName, 'Integration')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.LastName, 'Integration')), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User No DF'
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Account can be modified only by Account Owner or User with Sales Ops Extended profile
